name: af-platform-icons
title: AF Platform Icons
description: 8 recognizable platform brand icons as SVG components — WhatsApp, Gmail, Facebook, Instagram, Telegram, iMessage, Phone, Mail. Geometric resemblances (NOT literal logos). Each accepts size prop (default 24) + standard SVG props. Used by af-ios-notification icon slot + AF UIs needing platform attribution. Bundled into one file with named exports + an AfPlatformIcons name-keyed map for dynamic selection.
